appliedUpdates.description: Added Phase 4 Game Systems validation guidance with concurrency, flow validator sections for Games Hub, Individual Games, and Game Persistence & Dashboard

notes.gamesHub: Games hub at /#/games displays all 3 games with proper navigation to /games/hangman, /games/register-rally, /games/flag-frenzy
notes.hangman: Instruction Hangman fully functional with masked instruction, category hints, keyboard input, feedback, and game-over condition
notes.registerRally: Register Rally matching interface functional with 8 registers and descriptions
notes.flagFrenzy: Flag Frenzy prediction game functional with scenario display and flag selection UI

round2Fixes.P4-GAME-005: Verified via agent-browser storage local command - localStorage keys acs2906_hangman_stats and acs2906_gameScores are saved after game play with correct data structure
round2Fixes.P4-GAME-006: Verified via browser automation - Dashboard at /#/progress shows 'Instruction Hangman' with 'Played 1 time' and score 0. fix-dashboard-game-integration feature resolved the integration issue
